title: Animated Candles E-Commerce App — Full Stack Initial Build

requirements.text: Design and apply a cohesive visual theme using blue, white, pink, and violet as the primary palette. The UI should feel elegant and romantic, with soft gradients, glowing candle-inspired accents, and smooth micro-animations throughout. Typography should be refined and readable. Layout must be fully responsive across mobile phones, tablets, laptops, and desktop screens.

quotes: फोन, वेबसाइट और कंप्यूटर, लैपटॉप सबके लिए अवेलेबल हो

acceptanceCriteria: All pages use only blue, white, pink, and violet color tokens
UI renders correctly and looks polished at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1280px) breakpoints
Animated glow and flicker effects are visible on candle-themed UI elements

requirements.text: Build a Login page supporting sign-in via email+password and Google OAuth. Build a separate Registration page supporting sign-up via email address, phone number, and Google OAuth. Both pages must follow the blue/white/pink/violet theme with animated candle background elements.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page accepts email+password credentials and Google OAuth sign-in
Registration page accepts name, email, phone number, password, and Google OAuth
Successful login/registration redirects to the home/product listing page
Form validation errors are shown inline with clear messages
Both pages display animated candle visual elements in the background

requirements.text: Implement a Candle Product Catalog backend that stores product records including: name, description, price (INR), stock quantity, category, and one or more photo URLs. Expose backend methods to create, read, update, and delete products (admin), and to list/filter products (public).

quotes: मैं अपने कैंडल्स के फोटो अपलोड करूंगा

acceptanceCriteria: Backend stores product records with all specified fields
Admin can add, edit, and delete candle products
Public listing query returns paginated product results
Photo URLs are stored and returned with product data

requirements.text: Build a Product Listing / Home page that displays all available candle products as cards with photo, name, price, and an Add-to-Cart button. Include animated candle flame effects on product cards (CSS/Lottie-style flicker animation). Each card links to a Product Detail page showing full description, photos, price, stock status, user reviews & ratings, and Add-to-Cart / Add-to-Wishlist actions.

quotes: वह फोटोस को अगर किसी को पसंद रहेगा तो वह अपने का कार्ड में ऐड करेगा

acceptanceCriteria: Product cards display photo, name, and price with animated candle flame effect
Clicking a card opens a Product Detail page with full info
Add-to-Cart button is present and functional on both listing and detail pages
Add-to-Wishlist button is present on the detail page
Reviews and star ratings are displayed on the detail page

requirements.text: Implement a Shopping Cart and Checkout flow. Users can view cart items, adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout. The checkout page collects shipping address and displays order summary. Integrate a simulated Stripe payment flow (since UPI direct API integration is not available in this platform, use Stripe as the payment gateway which supports INR).

quotes: UPI से कर सकते हैं पेमेंट

acceptanceCriteria: Cart page lists all added items with quantity controls and remove option
Order total is calculated correctly including item quantities
Checkout page collects shipping address fields
Stripe payment form is rendered and a test payment can be submitted
Order confirmation is shown after successful payment

requirements.text: Implement a Wishlist / Favorites feature. Logged-in users can add candle products to their wishlist, view their wishlist page, and move items from wishlist to cart.

quotes: एक पसंदीदा कैंडल्स की लिस्ट बनाने का फीचर

acceptanceCriteria: Heart/bookmark icon on product cards and detail pages adds/removes from wishlist
Wishlist page shows all saved products
Move-to-Cart button on wishlist items works correctly
Wishlist data is persisted per user account

requirements.text: Implement a Loyalty / Rewards Program. Users earn points on each completed purchase (e.g., 1 point per ₹10 spent). A Rewards page shows the user's current point balance, points history, and available rewards/discounts they can redeem.

quotes: loyalty प्रोग्राम भी कस्टमर्स को बनाए रखने में मदद कर सकता है

acceptanceCriteria: Points are awarded to user account after a completed order
User's rewards page displays current point balance and transaction history
At least one reward redemption option is shown (e.g., discount coupon)

requirements.text: Add an AI Chatbot widget that appears as a floating button on all pages. When opened, it shows a chat panel where users can type questions and receive automated helpful responses about candles, orders, and the store. The chatbot should simulate AI responses (rule-based or scripted) since external AI API integrations are not supported.

quotes: एक चैट बोर्ड पर रख दो ताकि कस्टमर उस एआई से बात कर सके

acceptanceCriteria: Floating chatbot button is visible on all pages
Clicking it opens a chat panel with a message input
Bot responds with helpful scripted answers to common queries (e.g., order status, candle types, delivery)
Chat panel matches the blue/white/pink/violet theme

requirements.text: Add a Customer Care / Support page accessible from the navigation. It should include a contact form (name, email, subject, message), a FAQ section with common candle business questions, and business contact details. Also include a Live Chat placeholder section with support availability hours.

quotes: कस्टमर केयर भी ऐड कर देना

acceptanceCriteria: Customer Care page is reachable via main navigation
Contact form submits and stores the inquiry in the backend
FAQ section shows at least 5 relevant questions and answers
Live chat section clearly shows support hours and a contact prompt

requirements.text: Create a User Reviews & Ratings backend. Logged-in users who have purchased a product can submit a star rating (1–5) and a text review. Expose methods to submit a review and fetch reviews by product ID.
acceptanceCriteria: Review submission stores user ID, product ID, rating, review text, and timestamp
Only users with a completed purchase of the product can submit a review
Reviews for a product are returned sorted by newest first
Average star rating is computed and returned per product

constraints: Do not use external AI APIs (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.) for the chatbot — use scripted/rule-based responses only
UPI direct API is not available; use Stripe (which supports INR) as the payment gateway

Google OAuth must be implemented as a frontend UI pattern only — do not use Auth0 or Facebook; Internet Identity is the supported auth method, so Google login should be presented as a UI option that maps to the available auth system
Color palette must strictly use blue, white, pink, and violet — no other dominant colors
All Motoko logic must remain in a single backend actor file
nonGoals: Native mobile app (iOS/Android) — web responsive only
SMS OTP verification for phone number registration
External social media API integrations (Instagram shopping, etc.)
Inventory management dashboard beyond basic product CRUD

required: Hero banner with glowing candles arrangement on a dark romantic background with soft blue, pink and violet bokeh light effects (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
Animated-style candle flame illustration with violet and pink glow for use as a decorative UI element (candle-flame-icon.dim_256x256.png)
App logo — stylized candle with a glowing flame using pink and violet colors on a white background (luminary-logo.dim_400x400.png)
Background texture — dark deep blue with subtle violet gradient and faint sparkle particles for auth pages (auth-bg.dim_1440x900.png)
